title: Snowcone
description: Attract happy ghasts without accidentally throwing them snowballs!
body:
## Overview
Have you ever tried getting your happy ghast to go near you with a snowball in your hand, only to then right click and hurt it instead? This simple datapack adds a single item: the snowcone, which will attract happy ghasts without any right click annoyances.


## Heads up
This is a DATAPACK. Adding new custom items is currently not possible. The snowcone is a test block underneath.
